zh.Beaudesert, Warwickshire, England: 英國瓦維其可爾波奧德瑟特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Beatrice de Cheyne於1090年9月6日出生在英國肯特坦時，她的父親Ralph de Caisneto Cheyne II22歲，母親Aeliz de Maminot15歲。她和Ralph Murdac至少有2個女兒。她去世於1170年7月8日在英國瓦維其可爾波奧德瑟特享年79歲。

zh-hans.Beaudesert, Warwickshire, England: 英国瓦維其可爾波奧德瑟特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Beatrice de Cheyne于1090年9月6日出生在英国肯特坦时，她的父亲Ralph de Caisneto Cheyne II22岁，母亲Aeliz de Maminot15岁。她和Ralph Murdac至少有2个女儿。她去世于1170年7月8日在英国瓦維其可爾波奧德瑟特享年79岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Cheyne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (northeastern Scotland and Shetland): shortened form of   Chaney  , of Norman origin.

variants.name: Chaney
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from any one of several places in Normandy, Picardy, or Artois (France) named (Le) Quesnay or Quesnoy, or elsewhere in northern France named (Le or La) Chesnay or Chesnoy. The placenames all derive from Old French chesnai or its Normanno-Picard equivalent quesnai ‘oak grove’ (medieval Latin casnetum).
French: variant of Chanet, a habitational name from any of various places called Chanet or Le Chanet, from Latin canna ‘reed’ + the suffix -etum denoting an inhabitant.

nameMeanings.name: Beatrice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and French form of   Beatrix  , which was quite popular in England during the Middle Ages, and strongly revived in the 19th century. It is most famous as the name of Dante's beloved, and is borne by the elder (  b. 1988 ) of the Duke of York's daughters.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Beatrice de Cheyne was born on 6 September 1090, in Petham, Kent, England, her father, Ralph de Caisneto Cheyne II, was 22 and her mother, Aeliz de Maminot, was 15. She had at least 2 daughters with Ralph Murdac. She died on 8 July 1170, in Beaudesert, Warwickshire, England, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Beatrice de Cheyne est née le 6 septembre 1090, à Petham, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Ralph de Caisneto Cheyne II, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Aeliz de Maminot, avait 15 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 filles avec Ralph Murdac. Elle est décédée le 8 juillet 1170, à Beaudesert, Warwickshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 79 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Beatrice de Cheyne am 6. September 1090 in Petham, Kent, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ralph de Caisneto Cheyne II 22 und ihre Mutter Aeliz de Maminot 15. Sie hatte mit Ralph Murdac mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 8. Juli 1170 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Beaudesert, Warwickshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrice de Cheyne è nata il il 6 settembre 1090 nel Petham, Kent, England, sua padre, Ralph de Caisneto Cheyne II, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Aeliz de Maminot, aveva 15 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figlie con Ralph Murdac. Morì il 8 luglio 1170, nel Beaudesert, Warwickshire, England, all'età di 79 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Beatrice de Cheyneが1090年9月6日にイギリスケントペサムで生まれた時，父Ralph de Caisneto Cheyne IIは22歳，母Aeliz de Maminotは15歳であった。彼女はRalph Murdacとの間に少なくとも2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1170年7月8日にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアビーウデセルトで79歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Beatrice de Cheyne(이)가 1090년 9월 6일 영국 켄트 페섬에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ralph de Caisneto Cheyne II(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Aeliz de Maminot(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 Ralph Murdac(와)과 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1170년 7월 8일 영국 워윅실르 보데세르트에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.6 September 1090–8 July 1170: 6 de setembro de 1090–8 de julho de 1170
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrice de Cheyne nasceu em 6 de setembro de 1090, em Petham, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph de Caisneto Cheyne II, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Aeliz de Maminot, tinha 15 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhas com Ralph Murdac. Ela faleceu em 8 de julho de 1170, em Beaudesert, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, com 79 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Beatrice de Cheyne родилась 6 сентября 1090 г. в местности петам, кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени Ralph de Caisneto Cheyne II было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Aeliz de Maminot, 15. У неё было по крайней мере 2 дочери от Ralph Murdac. Она умерла 8 июля 1170 г. в местности бодесирт, варвиккшир, Англия в возрасте 79 лет.

es.6 September 1090–8 July 1170: 6 de septiembre de 1090–8 de julio de 1170
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Beatrice de Cheyne nació el 6 de septiembre de 1090, en Petham, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Ralph de Caisneto Cheyne II, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Aeliz de Maminot, tenía 15 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijas con Ralph Murdac. Murió el 8 de julio de 1170, en Beaudesert, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 79 años.
